reviews.name: Abu Baker
reviews.review:
Ash recently completed a full painting and decorating project for our entire large 4-bedroom house, including all walls, ceilings, woodwork, the garage floor, and restoring several wooden doors by removing the old paint and bringing them back to their original oak finish.

From start to finish, Ash was professional, friendly, approachable, and an excellent communicator. He kept us informed throughout the project and was always happy to answer questions and offer advice.

The quality of his workmanship is outstanding. Every room in the house has been finished to an exceptionally high standard, with great attention to detail throughout. The restored oak doors look fantastic, and the garage floor has been transformed with a durable, professional finish.

What impressed me most was how clean and tidy everything was left. Despite the scale of the project, there was no paint residue, splashes, or mess anywhere in the house. Ash clearly takes great pride in his work and treats his customers' homes with respect.

Ash is not just a painter and decorator; he is a true craftsman and artist. The transformation of our home has exceeded our expectations, and we could not be happier with the final result.

I would highly recommend Ash to anyone looking for a trustworthy, reliable, and highly skilled painter and decorator. I will definitely use his services again in the future and will happily recommend him to friends and family. If you need someone you can trust to deliver exceptional results, Ash is the person to call.

reviews.name: Deborah Gowers
reviews.review: Ash repainted my stairwell and the rendering on the front of my house. All the work has been done beautifully and to a high standard. Ash kept the areas tidy and checked details about the work with me to make sure it was done as I wanted it to be. It was easy to contact Ash to arrange a start date and the work was completed on time despite episodes of very heavy rainfall and hail. I would definitely recommend and would book Ash again in future.

reviews.name: Paul Wilkinson
reviews.review: We can highly recommend Ash. We hadn't got prior recommendation but took faith in his public online reviews, and we're so glad we did. Initially he asked for a video of the work we wanted doing — handmade wooden kitchen cupboards which unfortunately hadn't been treated properly and the knot stain oils had started to discolour the paintwork. Ash sanded back, treated the knots, primed and hand painted, and it's like we have a new kitchen! He's done an amazing job and we're so happy. We'll definitely be having Ash back for future projects. He was punctual, polite, friendly, cleaned up after himself and worked without breaks. Amazing service. Thank you Ash.

reviews.name: Arun Singh
reviews.review: We recently hired Ash to paint our entire house, and I couldn't be more pleased with the results. He was excellent from start to finish. He was very efficient, worked cleanly, and did exactly what he said he was going to do. The job was finished on time, and the quality of the work is outstanding. Both my partner and I are extremely happy with the end result and wouldn't hesitate to recommend him to anyone looking for a reliable, professional painter.

reviews.name: Vicki Hallam
reviews.review: Highly recommend Ash. This was the first job he has done for me. He painted the front of my house and did a cracking job. A very pleasant chap who was punctual and a very tidy worker. Look no further if you need a painter!

reviews.name: Hema Davda
reviews.review: Ash is a fantastic painter/decorator, he really paid attention to detail and is a true perfectionist! He even carried out all of the touch ups and extra jobs without any qualms. He arrived promptly every day and was very tidy ensuring that everything was left in a neat manner at the end of the day. I would highly recommend his work and will be using him again!

reviews.name: Yasmin Kyriacou
reviews.review: Ashley was brilliant, reliable, trustworthy and went above and beyond to help me. His work is to a very high standard and he's been great start to finish. I've already recommended him to other family members. Thank you!

reviews.name: CV
reviews.review: Absolutely fantastic paint job on my lounge. Such care and attention to detail and Ash is lovely to have around. Communication before the job was also faultless. I can write such a glowing review as I already have him booked in for more work next year so have secured my spot :-)

reviews.name: Reena Purewal
reviews.review: Voluntary Action LeicesterShire is a local Charity, we came across A.S Painting Contractors last year. Ash was polite on the phone and came out to do a site visit within a day of VAL contacting him. His price was very reasonable and due to the nature of our building and clients, Ash worked outside of office hours. Ash was approached again 6 months later with a large project of painting our dated corridors and front staircase, Ash worked evenings, weekends to ensure the deadline was met, Ash takes pride in his work and this shows through his finish. The quality of his work truly stands out. Moreover, the quotes Ashley provides are very reasonable, offering great value for the excellent service he delivers. I highly recommend Ashley for any painting needs. Five stars. Ash after being at VAL through his various areas of work, became familiar with our VALUES Project which works with adults with a learning disability, Ash was so generous to offer his time and material and painted their cooking kitchen for FREE. Ash comes highly recommended, and we are very grateful for the time he spent transforming our VALUES Cooking Kitchen.

reviews.name: Sivaraj Padmaraj
reviews.review: We recently had our kitchen painted by Ashley from A S Painting Contractor, and we couldn't be more pleased with the experience. From the start, Ashley was prompt, honest, and professional. He respected our time, arriving on schedule and completing the job quicker than expected—without disrupting our daily routine. Not only did he stick to our budget, but he also went above and beyond, delivering more than we expected in terms of quality and attention to detail. It's rare to find someone so reliable and dedicated to doing a great job. I highly recommend Ashley for anyone looking for a stress-free and high-quality painting service.

reviews.name: William Senior
reviews.review: Great service. Would highly recommend. We have made another booking for another site. Ash was very helpful and did a fantastic job.

reviews.name: Chris Yewdall
reviews.review: I hired Ash to paint the outside of the house and garage - windows, doors, iron railings and driveway gate. Ash quoted a fair price and asked for a small deposit to cover the materials and showed up exactly when he said he would (on a bank holiday no less!). The most impressive aspect of Ash's work is his attention to the preparation. He sanded everything down meticulously and applied two coats of paint. The whole project took over a week. I really enjoyed working with Ash, he is courteous and polite, cracks on with the job and you can tell that he takes pride in his work. I already recommended him to a couple I bumped into in Wickes and would recommend him to anyone looking for quality work from a reliable painter.

reviews.name: Ben Martin
reviews.review: Highly recommend Ash, I've had him in three times to do different rooms, and every time the job is perfect. Friendly and knowledgable, and prompt.

reviews.name: Paz Seni
reviews.review: Ash, is a true professional, arrived fully prepared to paint ceilings, provided full coverage for all our larger pieces of furniture. We are so pleased with the quality of the work we have booked Ash to complete additional work to take place. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Andrew Beighton
reviews.review: An absolute pleasure to deal with! Ashley is a very talented and skilled lad. I found him very honest and trustworthy to deal with. He was clean and his professionalism is bang on. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend to any friends or family.

reviews.name: Carlos Hill
reviews.review: Very happy with the work from Ash. Amazing job and excellent communication. Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: Landong Zuo
reviews.review: I recently had the exterior walls of my 2-bed house painted by Ash, and I must say, the results have exceeded my expectations! Ash displayed professionalism, skill, and attention to detail throughout the entire process. I highly recommend this painting service to anyone looking for quality and reliability. Thank you for transforming my home with such dedication and expertise!

reviews.name: Ruth Simon
reviews.review: Thankyou Ash for the paint job and your extra help putting things back. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Shereen
reviews.review: Fantastic job done by Ash for the whole house! We've used Ash a few times now (for family member homes too) and cannot recommend him enough. Thanks again!

reviews.name: Sue Iliffe
reviews.review: It's such a relief to find a tradesperson who keeps in touch and turns up when they say they will. Ash did a wonderful job on our staircase and was very careful to cover carpets etc. We will certainly be asking for his help again.

reviews.name: Ketan Patel
reviews.review: Ash was great start to finish. Great quality work and would definitely call again when needed. You can't go wrong with him for your decorating needs.

reviews.name: Ravinder Billing
reviews.review: Ash was great, high quality finish. All done on time. Really polite and professional. Thank you!

reviews.name: Harsh Patel
reviews.review: Had an excellent experience with Ashley. Called for a quote and was not hopeful of finding someone to meet my timelines. Ashley came on-site to provide a quote and went out his way to fit me in. Price was good and work ethic and finish was great. Every day turned up early and can't remember him taking much of a break. Always provided advice as he was painting and came back again at short notice to touch up for me. Will definitely be using his services again in the future.

reviews.name: Erin Billing
reviews.review: Ash was great. Very professional, high quality job. Would use again thank you!

reviews.name: Lynne Stubbs
reviews.review: Ash worked really hard and fitted in to our timescale perfectly. He did an excellent job on freshly plastered walls, the finish is superb. Would highly recommend.

reviews.name: S. T.
reviews.review: We had a domestic painting job, Ash provided an impeccable service, and ensured the job was completed to an excellent standard. Would highly recommend to anyone, well worth the investment and is priced competitively!

reviews.name: Adam Kennedy
reviews.review: AS decorated our new house throughout 2 years ago including the front door internally and externally. We have had them back since to paint the fencing and update the kitchen with a feature wall. Ash was professional, polite, gave honest advice, was fair in price and the work was completed to a very high standard in the time said! Will be coming back to AS in the summer for exterior painting and maybe to refresh the house. Defo recommend.

reviews.name: Marie Busby
reviews.review: I have used this company a couple of times now. Ashley is very friendly and I have always been very pleased with the work he does. I have had my hall/stairs/landing painted and my kitchen. I'm having my living room decorated next month. Very pleased with the quote he gives me, highly recommended 5 stars.

reviews.name: Mary McDonagh
reviews.review: A very professional and highly experienced decorator, I can completely understand why he has won the awards he has. Ashley made the whole process during lockdown as stress free as possible, taking all necessary measures to comply with safety protocols. I would highly recommend using A.S Painting Contractors to anyone looking for quality workmanship and value for money, and fully intend to hire him again.

reviews.name: Zoe King
reviews.review: Ash painted the exterior of our house. He did a fantastic job. Was very polite and friendly. Worked really hard. Great job.
